news.title:
BLS International FZE, a subsidiary of BLS International Services, acquired 100% of Ecuador-based BLSEC S.A.S.
The acquisition aims to expand their visa and related services with a cash consideration of USD 1,000.
news.summary:
BLS International FZE, a subsidiary of BLS International Services, acquired 100% of Ecuador-based BLSEC S.A.S.
The acquisition aims to expand their visa and related services with a cash consideration of USD 1,000.

news.title:
BLS International Services Ltd to virtually attend Bharat Connect Conference on March 10, 2026.
Discussions will focus on financial and operational performance; no unpublished price-sensitive info to be shared.
news.summary:
BLS International Services Ltd to virtually attend Bharat Connect Conference on March 10, 2026.
Discussions will focus on financial and operational performance; no unpublished price-sensitive info to be shared.

news.title:
BLS International reports unusual share volume rise with no undisclosed material info.
The company affirms its commitment to transparent disclosures despite unclear volume cause.
news.summary:
BLS International reports unusual share volume rise with no undisclosed material info.
The company affirms its commitment to transparent disclosures despite unclear volume cause.

news.title:
BLS International's Dec 2025 net sales rose 43.6% YoY to ₹736.46 crore.
Despite growth, its financial trend rating dropped to 'positive' and mojo grade to 'Sell'.
news.summary:
BLS International's Dec 2025 net sales rose 43.6% YoY to ₹736.46 crore.
Despite growth, its financial trend rating dropped to 'positive' and mojo grade to 'Sell'.

news.title: BLS International declared a dividend of Rs 2/share for shareholders.
news.summary: BLS International declared a dividend of Rs 2/share for shareholders.

news.title:
BLS International approved Q3 and 9-month unaudited financials for Dec 31, 2025.
Declared 1st interim dividend of 200% on Rs. 1 FV; record date Feb 13, 2026.
news.summary:
BLS International approved Q3 and 9-month unaudited financials for Dec 31, 2025.
Declared 1st interim dividend of 200% on Rs. 1 FV; record date Feb 13, 2026.

news.title: BLS International Services reported Q3 revenue of 7.4B rupees, up from 5.1B YoY.
news.summary: BLS International Services reported Q3 revenue of 7.4B rupees, up from 5.1B YoY.

news.title:
BLS International FZE acquired 95% of Bahrain-based MVA International W.L.L.
The acquisition, valued at 1000 BHD, enhances BLS's business portfolio.
news.summary:
BLS International FZE acquired 95% of Bahrain-based MVA International W.L.L.
The acquisition, valued at 1000 BHD, enhances BLS's business portfolio.

news.title:
BLS International named Visa Outsourcing Partner for Cyprus Embassy in China, Cambodia, Laos, and Mongolia.
The partnership aims to streamline visa processing and improve applicant services in these regions.
news.summary:
BLS International named Visa Outsourcing Partner for Cyprus Embassy in China, Cambodia, Laos, and Mongolia.
The partnership aims to streamline visa processing and improve applicant services in these regions.

news.title:
BLS International Services won a ₹1B contract for Aadhaar enrollment in Bihar.
This boosts BLS International's capabilities in government service projects.
news.summary:
BLS International Services won a ₹1B contract for Aadhaar enrollment in Bihar.
This boosts BLS International's capabilities in government service projects.

news.title:
BLS International secures visa outsourcing deal in South Africa from Cyprus.
This marks a significant expansion of BLS International's regional services.
news.summary:
BLS International secures visa outsourcing deal in South Africa from Cyprus.
This marks a significant expansion of BLS International's regional services.

news.title: BLS International anticipates 20-25% annual growth over the next five years.
news.summary: BLS International anticipates 20-25% annual growth over the next five years.

news.title:
BLS Intl surges as Delhi HC overturns MEA's debarment; restrictions withdrawn.
Q2 FY26 profit rose 26.8% to Rs 175.2 crore; revenue up 48.8% to Rs 736.6 crore.
news.summary:
BLS Intl surges as Delhi HC overturns MEA's debarment; restrictions withdrawn.
Q2 FY26 profit rose 26.8% to Rs 175.2 crore; revenue up 48.8% to Rs 736.6 crore.

news.title:
Delhi HC quashes 2-year debarment on BLS International Services Ltd.
BLS can now bid for government tenders with MEA and India Missions abroad.
news.summary:
Delhi HC quashes 2-year debarment on BLS International Services Ltd.
BLS can now bid for government tenders with MEA and India Missions abroad.

news.title:
Kalpataru Projects secured Rs 2,003 crore orders, boosting YTD intake to Rs 17,000 crore; shares rose 0.6% to Rs 1,171.65.
Shakti Pumps and Oswal Pumps won solar pump orders worth Rs 443.78 crore and Rs 380 crore; shares fell 8.5% and rose 1.3%, respectively.
news.summary:
Kalpataru Projects secured Rs 2,003 crore orders, boosting YTD intake to Rs 17,000 crore; shares rose 0.6% to Rs 1,171.65.
Shakti Pumps and Oswal Pumps won solar pump orders worth Rs 443.78 crore and Rs 380 crore; shares fell 8.5% and rose 1.3%, respectively.

news.title:
BLS International renews MEA contract for Attestation & Apostille services across 17 Indian centres.
Q2 FY26 revenue grew 48.8% YoY to Rs 736 crore; profit rose 27.7% to Rs 185 crore.
news.summary:
BLS International renews MEA contract for Attestation & Apostille services across 17 Indian centres.
Q2 FY26 revenue grew 48.8% YoY to Rs 736 crore; profit rose 27.7% to Rs 185 crore.

news.title:
BLS International's subsidiary acquired 100% share capital of BLS International LLC, Armenia.
The acquisition, valued at AED 97, expands visa and passport processing operations to Armenia.
news.summary:
BLS International's subsidiary acquired 100% share capital of BLS International LLC, Armenia.
The acquisition, valued at AED 97, expands visa and passport processing operations to Armenia.

news.title:
BLS Intl secures contract with Cyprus Embassy in Russia for visa outsourcing.
Deal showcases BLS's expanding role in visa processing sector.
news.summary:
BLS Intl secures contract with Cyprus Embassy in Russia for visa outsourcing.
Deal showcases BLS's expanding role in visa processing sector.

news.title:
BLS Intl's Q2 FY26 revenue grew 49% YoY to INR 737 cr; EBITDA rose 30% YoY to INR 213 cr with 29% margin.
Visa services revenue grew 10% YoY; digital services surged 259% YoY to INR 278 cr post acquisition.
news.summary:
BLS Intl's Q2 FY26 revenue grew 49% YoY to INR 737 cr; EBITDA rose 30% YoY to INR 213 cr with 29% margin.
Visa services revenue grew 10% YoY; digital services surged 259% YoY to INR 278 cr post acquisition.

news.title:
BLS International wins 5-year Slovak Republic contract to operate VACs in 80 countries.
Shares of BLS International traded at ₹325.50 on NSE after recovering from ₹318.75 intraday low.
news.summary:
BLS International wins 5-year Slovak Republic contract to operate VACs in 80 countries.
Shares of BLS International traded at ₹325.50 on NSE after recovering from ₹318.75 intraday low.
